iPXE UEFI Secure Boot chain + wimboot, bundled with Deploy Manager.

Source : https://github.com/ipxe/ipxe/releases/tag/v2.0.0  (ipxeboot.tar.gz)
         https://github.com/ipxe/wimboot/releases/latest      (wimboot)
iPXE    : v2.0.0

ipxe-shim.efi    Microsoft-signed shim (UEFI boot file; DHCP option 67). Loads ipxe.efi.
ipxe.efi         iPXE, full drivers, signed by the iPXE Secure Boot CA.
snponly-shim.efi Microsoft-signed shim. Loads snponly.efi.
snponly.efi      iPXE, SNP-only driver, signed by the iPXE Secure Boot CA.
undionly.kpxe    Legacy BIOS iPXE.
wimboot          Secure Boot-capable WIM loader.

To update to a newer signed release, run scripts\Get-IpxeBinaries.ps1 on the server.
